trans-unit.source: Capture a screenshot from the active tracked browser session and save it as a PNG artifact.
trans-unit.target: Capture a screenshot from the active tracked browser session and save it as a PNG artifact.

trans-unit.source: Click an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.
trans-unit.target: Click an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

trans-unit.source: Close the active tracked browser page for this resource.
trans-unit.target: Close the active tracked browser page for this resource.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the resource name or scope that the settings apply to

trans-unit.source: Choose an installed Chromium-based browser or enter an executable path.
trans-unit.target: Choose an installed Chromium-based browser or enter an executable path.

trans-unit.source: Choose the browser, profile, user data mode, and scope used by tracked browser sessions.
trans-unit.target: Choose the browser, profile, user data mode, and scope used by tracked browser sessions.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser settings cannot be configured because dashboard interactions are not available.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser settings cannot be configured because dashboard interactions are not available.

trans-unit.source: Choose a Chromium profile from the Aspire-managed browser hive, or enter a profile directory/name.
trans-unit.target: Choose a Chromium profile from the Aspire-managed browser hive, or enter a profile directory/name.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the Chromium profile directory name, {1} is the Chromium profile display name

trans-unit.source: Profiles can only be selected when user data mode is Shared.
trans-unit.target: Profiles can only be selected when user data mode is Shared.

trans-unit.source: Choose tracked browser settings. Resource-specific settings override global BrowserLogs settings.
trans-unit.target: Choose tracked browser settings. Resource-specific settings override global BrowserLogs settings.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser settings could not be saved to user secrets for key '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser settings could not be saved to user secrets for key '{0}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the user secrets configuration key

trans-unit.source: Save these settings to [user secrets](https://aka.ms/aspire/user-secrets) so future AppHost runs use them.
trans-unit.target: Save these settings to [user secrets](https://aka.ms/aspire/user-secrets) so future AppHost runs use them.

trans-unit.source: User secrets are not configured for this AppHost, so settings can only apply to this running AppHost.
trans-unit.target: User secrets are not configured for this AppHost, so settings can only apply to this running AppHost.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the resource name or scope that the settings apply to

trans-unit.source: User data mode must be Shared or Isolated.
trans-unit.target: User data mode must be Shared or Isolated.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser settings cannot be saved because the AppHost does not have user secrets configured.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser settings cannot be saved because the AppHost does not have user secrets configured.

trans-unit.source: Fill an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.
trans-unit.target: Fill an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

trans-unit.source: Return a JSON snapshot of the active tracked browser page, including URL, title, visible text, and actionable elements with selectors.
trans-unit.target: Return a JSON snapshot of the active tracked browser page, including URL, title, visible text, and actionable elements with selectors.

trans-unit.source: Keyboard key to press, such as Enter, Escape, Tab, or a single character.
trans-unit.target: Keyboard key to press, such as Enter, Escape, Tab, or a single character.

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of actionable elements to include in the page snapshot.
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of actionable elements to include in the page snapshot.

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of visible page text characters to include in the page snapshot.
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of visible page text characters to include in the page snapshot.

trans-unit.source: Navigate the active tracked browser page to an absolute URL.
trans-unit.target: Navigate the active tracked browser page to an absolute URL.

trans-unit.source: Open the app in a tracked browser session and stream browser logs to this resource.
trans-unit.target: Open the app in a tracked browser session and stream browser logs to this resource.

trans-unit.source: Press a key on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Press a key on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Select an option in a browser select element by option value or visible text.
trans-unit.target: Select an option in a browser select element by option value or visible text.

trans-unit.source: Option value or visible option text to select.
trans-unit.target: Option value or visible option text to select.

trans-unit.source: CSS selector for the target element. Use selectors returned by Inspect browser page when possible.
trans-unit.target: CSS selector for the target element. Use selectors returned by Inspect browser page when possible.

trans-unit.source: Visible page text to wait for.
trans-unit.target: Visible page text to wait for.

trans-unit.source: Maximum time to wait before the browser command fails.
trans-unit.target: Maximum time to wait before the browser command fails.

trans-unit.source: Text value to assign to the target field.
trans-unit.target: Text value to assign to the target field.

trans-unit.source: Wait until a selector is visible, text appears on the page, or both conditions are met.
trans-unit.target: Wait until a selector is visible, text appears on the page, or both conditions are met.
